---
title: tuples
subtitle: python
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("~/github/how2/_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("~/github/how2/_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

## construction

```{python}
(1,2,3)
tuple([1,2,3]) # casting
1,2,3
```

*********************************************************************

## assertions

```{python}
mytuple = ('a', 'b', 'c')
'b' in mytuple
```

*********************************************************************

## indexing

Same as lists.

*********************************************************************

## methods

```{python}
mytuple = ('a', 'b', 'c')
# mytuple.append('d') # no append method - tuples are immutable
mytuple
```
